ticket: My credit card was charged twice for the May invoice. Please refund the duplicate charge.
I see a charge on my account from last month that I do not recognize. Can someone explain what this is?
The annual renewal pulled the wrong card. Please switch the payment method to the new card on file.
I cannot log in after the password reset email. The new password is rejected as invalid.
My SSO session keeps timing out after about ten minutes. Other users in my team are not seeing this.
Two-factor authentication codes are not arriving on my phone. I have tried both SMS and the authenticator app.
The Salesforce integration stopped syncing contacts last Tuesday. The error log shows a 401 from their API.
How do I set up the Slack integration so notifications go to a private channel instead of the default one?
Webhook deliveries to our endpoint are failing with timeouts. We need to debug what is being sent.
The iOS app crashes on launch after the latest TestFlight update. Crash report attached.
The Android app does not show push notifications even though they are enabled in settings.
Dark mode in the mobile app does not match the website. Some screens stay light when the OS is set to dark.
Page load times have doubled this week. Our team's dashboard takes nine seconds to render now.
Search results are very slow when there are more than fifty filters applied. Users are giving up before results appear.
We see intermittent 504 gateway timeouts on the analytics endpoint, mostly during peak hours.
How do I export all our customer records to CSV? I need to share them with our finance team for year-end audit.
The bulk export feature times out for accounts with more than fifty thousand records. Is there a chunked approach?
I want to set up a monthly automatic export of campaign metrics to S3. Can the platform do this natively?
The REST API rate limit is rejecting our requests at 100 per minute. We are billed for the higher tier and expect 1000.
Our integration is getting 500 errors when calling the bulk update endpoint with more than 200 items. The docs say 500 is the limit.
How do I rotate the API key without breaking active integrations? The docs are not clear on the grace period.
We received an alert about unusual login activity from an unfamiliar country. Can you confirm whether this was a real attempt and lock the account if needed?
Our compliance team is asking for SOC 2 documentation for the recent audit. Where do I download this from?
Can we enforce SAML for all users in our org? Some users are still allowed to use password login.
I just signed up. Can someone help me invite my team and set up our first workspace? The setup wizard is not loading.
The tutorial video on the welcome page is broken. The player just shows a black screen.
I am evaluating the platform for our team. What is the best way to import our existing data without committing to a paid plan?
We would love an option to bulk-tag tickets based on keyword matching. Right now we have to do this one ticket at a time.
Could the dashboard add a comparison view that overlays last quarter's metrics on the current quarter? This would save a lot of manual work.
Please add OAuth support for Microsoft accounts. Many of our users are on Office 365 and prefer this.
The export button on the reports page does nothing when clicked. The browser console shows a TypeError on undefined.
When I edit a record and click save, the changes appear to apply but revert after a refresh. This started today.
The date picker is showing dates in the wrong timezone. We are in UTC+5:30 and it shows UTC times.
I have a quick question about whether the platform supports custom fields. Can someone get back to me?
Just wanted to say thanks for the recent UI refresh. The team likes the new layout.
